description_long: This object is a modern, cylindrical oven with a matte dark gray exterior and a prominent, vertically oriented rectangular window on the front. The window reveals a vivid, fiery interior, suggesting active combustion or heating, typical of a wood-burning or pellet stove. The oven's body is smooth and rounded, with subtle panel lines and a seamless appearance, giving it a contemporary and robust look. The front window is slightly curved to match the cylindrical form, and the door appears to be integrated into the front face, likely hinged on one side. No visible control panel, handle, or brand markings are apparent from the exterior views. The oven stands upright and is designed to be placed on the floor, suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A sleek, cylindrical oven with a large curved front window showing a fiery interior, finished in matte dark gray with a modern, seamless design.
description_view_0: The oven is seen from the back, showing a smooth, featureless dark surface with no visible openings or controls.
description_view_1: A side-rear angle reveals the oven's cylindrical shape and the edge of the front window, with the rest of the body remaining smooth and unadorned.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large, curved rectangular window with a visible fire inside, set into the matte dark gray body.
description_view_3: A side-front angle shows the depth of the window and the oven's rounded form, with the window slightly recessed into the body.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel or controls are present on the exterior surfaces in any view.
attribute_door_handle_type: No visible door handle; the door appears to be integrated and may use a concealed or push-to-open mechanism.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, vertically oriented rectangular window is set into the front, slightly curved to match the oven's cylindrical shape.
